name: Primo Personal Loans
description_short: Primo Personal Loans New Orleans, Louisiana — Primo Personal Loans offers express short-term loans from $100 to $5,000 in South Carolina, with no FICO s...
description_long:
Primo Personal Loans is a South Carolina-based lender headquartered at 1008 Gervais St STE 101 in Columbia, SC. The company operates both online and via phone, offering express loan products to individuals who need short-term access to cash. Their copyright notice shows active operations through 2026, and they maintain a physical office presence alongside their digital application channel.

The company offers two loan tiers: small-dollar loans from $100 to $1,000 and mid-range loans from $1,000 to $5,000, both branded as 'Express Loans.' Applicants can request a free quote online through an SSL and TSL-secured portal. The application process does not affect an applicant's FICO score; instead, Primo uses non-traditional consumer reporting agencies for underwriting decisions. Funds from online applications may take up to two business days to release pending verification.

What distinguishes Primo is its explicit use of alternative credit assessment rather than FICO scoring, which may make it accessible to borrowers with thin or non-traditional credit profiles. The lender is PATRIOT Act compliant and collects standard identity verification documents. Loan terms — including interest rates, repayment schedules, and fees — are determined by state regulations and individual borrower circumstances, and the company notes that not all applicants will qualify for the full requested amount.

Honestly, Primo Personal Loans positions itself as a short-term, emergency-style lender and explicitly states its products should not be used as a substitute for long-term financial planning. The website does not disclose APR ranges or fee structures, which makes comparison shopping difficult. The Memphis location linked in some directories returned a 404 error, raising questions about the accuracy of their listed footprint. Borrowers in financial hardship are directed to seek a licensed credit counselor before applying — a disclosure that signals this product carries meaningful cost.
address: 334 Canal St Space 100, New Orleans, LA 70130

company_info.headquarters: 334 Canal St Space 100, New Orleans, LA 70130

pros: Applications do not affect your FICO Score — uses non-traditional credit reporting only
Loan amounts start as low as $100, accessible for very small emergency needs
Free quote available before committing to any loan
SSL and TSL encryption on the application portal
Physical office in Columbia, SC for in-person support (1008 Gervais St STE 101)
Phone support available at (803) 674-5822 alongside online channel
PATRIOT Act compliant with standard identity verification procedures
cons: APR, interest rates, and fees are not disclosed anywhere on the website — impossible to compare costs upfront
Maximum loan amount is $5,000 — unsuitable for larger financial needs
Loan availability varies by state and not all applicants qualify for the requested amount
Online applications may delay funding by up to two business days
Non-traditional credit bureau inquiry may still affect your profile with that agency even though FICO is unaffected
best_for: South Carolina residents needing $100–$5,000 quickly for a short-term expense
Borrowers with thin, damaged, or non-traditional credit files who do not qualify through FICO-based lenders
Consumers who want to check loan eligibility without triggering a FICO inquiry
Individuals who prefer access to a physical office alongside an online application option
diagnosis: Primo Personal Loans is best suited for South Carolina borrowers who need a small, fast loan of $5,000 or less and may not qualify through traditional FICO-based lenders. The main caveat is that rates and fees are entirely undisclosed on the website, so borrowers must request full cost disclosure before committing — and should treat this strictly as a short-term solution given the company's own explicit warning against using it for long-term financial planning.
services: In-person loan services at Columbia, SC branch
Phone-based loan support and accessibility assistance
Identity verification and KYC processing (PATRIOT Act compliant)
Loan eligibility check with no FICO score impact
